product_overview: InsightPulse is a full-stack web application designed to analyze training survey data, leveraging AI to provide actionable insights. It integrates data import from Google Sheets, employs OpenAI GPT-4o for advanced analysis of open-ended feedback, and consolidates information to identify common issues and performance trends across training sessions.
core_goals: Enable secure role-based user authentication and authorization to protect survey data.
Provide an intuitive dashboard summarizing key metrics and recent training sessions for quick insights.
Facilitate comprehensive session management including listing, viewing, searching, filtering, and editing training sessions with metadata and ratings.
Import and process survey response data directly from Google Sheets, automating rating averages and grouping by session.
Perform AI-powered analyses on open-ended survey questions to extract themes and generate common issue reports.
Enable detailed session ratings across multiple dimensions, such as overall quality and repeatability, to provide quantitative assessment.
Support creation, tracking, and management of actionable follow-up items with prioritization, deadlines, and responsible assignees.
Provide reports for facilitators that compare performance metrics across sessions to drive improvement.
Support theme toggling for user interface between dark and light mode, enhancing user accessibility and preference.
key_features: Google OAuth authentication with JWT token management and role-based access control supporting admin, facilitator, and viewer roles.
Dashboard displaying total sessions, action items, average repeatability, and recent session activities.
Session management including CRUD operations, metadata tracking, rating metrics, and integrated AI analyses.
Import functionality fetching survey responses from Google Sheets using Google Sheets API and grouping data by session ID.
AI analysis powered by OpenAI GPT-4o to analyze open-ended questions and synthesize common issues tables.
Display of nine distinct session rating metrics such as overall quality, repeatability, among others.
Action item management with capabilities to create, edit, delete, and track priorities, status, assignees, and deadlines.
Reports feature for viewing facilitator performance and comparing session ratings over time.
User interface theme toggle for light and dark modes using a centralized theme context.
Reusable layout components including navbar, sidebar, and loading spinner to ensure consistent UI/UX.
Robust API communication layer using Axios with JWT authorization header injection for secure backend calls.
Relational database models for users, sessions, session ratings, question analyses, common issues, and action items implemented with SQLAlchemy and PostgreSQL.
user_flow_summary: User logs in via Google OAuth; system verifies identity and assigns role with JWT token for secured session management.
Upon login, user is directed to the dashboard showing aggregated statistics and recent sessions.
User views the sessions list, uses search and filters to find specific training sessions, and views detailed session pages with rating metrics and AI analyses.
User imports survey responses by providing a Google Sheets spreadsheet ID; backend fetches data, processes it, and updates session and analysis records.
AI service analyzes survey open-ended responses question by question, stores analysis, and synthesizes common issues to be displayed in session details.
Users with appropriate roles create, update, and manage action items linked to sessions to track improvement tasks.
Facilitators and admins access reports section to analyze facilitator performance metrics and compare session data.
Users toggle between light and dark themes as per preference for the UI.
Admin users manage user roles and have full CRUD operations on all data including sessions and action items.
validation_criteria: Authentication flow correctly enforces role-based access controls preventing unauthorized data access.
Dashboard correctly aggregates and displays up-to-date statistics for sessions and action items.
Session CRUD operations function correctly with data persisting and updating as expected.
Google Sheets import successfully fetches and processes survey data automatically grouping and averaging ratings.
AI analysis endpoints return coherent thematic analyses consistent with the input survey data.
Session ratings display accurate calculations across all nine specified metrics.
Action item management supports full lifecycle operations with appropriate validations on status, priority, deadlines, and assignees.
Reports display facilitator performance metrics and session comparisons accurately reflecting underlying data.
Theme toggle persists user preference and switches UI styles without visual or functional issues.
API requests consistently include JWT tokens and handle errors gracefully.
Database schema aligns with defined SQLAlchemy models with migrations applying successfully.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Google OAuth login via Supabase with JWT token management and role-based access control (admin/facilitator/viewer)

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard displaying statistics (total sessions, action items, avg repeatability) and recent sessions list

features.name: Session Management
features.description: List, view, search, filter and edit training sessions with metadata, ratings and AI analyses

features.name: Google Sheets Import
features.description: Import survey responses from Google Sheets, group by session_id, calculate averaged ratings

features.name: AI Analysis
features.description: GPT-4o analysis of open-ended survey questions to identify themes and generate common issues table

features.name: Session Ratings
features.description: Display and calculate 9 rating metrics per session (Overall Quality, Repeatability, etc.)

features.name: Action Items
features.description: Create, edit, delete and track action items with priority, status, assignee and deadline

features.name: Reports
features.description: View facilitator performance metrics and compare ratings across sessions

features.name: Theme Toggle
features.description: Dark mode toggle with theme context for light/dark mode switching

features.name: Layout Components
features.description: Common UI components including navbar, sidebar, and layout wrapper

features.name: API Service
features.description: Axios-based API client with JWT token injection for backend communication

features.name: Database Models
features.description: SQLAlchemy models for User, Session, QuestionAnalysis, CommonIssue, ActionItem, SessionRating
